---
title: "New Legal Framework for Technical and Vocational Education"
date: 2022-01-01
description: "Designed the economic and fiscal case for a landmark reform modernising Brazil's vocational education system, expanding access and improving labour market alignment."
categories: [Education, Labour Market]
---

As Senior Economic Advisor to Congresswoman Tabata Amaral, I led the economic analysis underpinning the New Legal Framework for Technical and Vocational Education (*Nova Lei de Educação Profissional e Tecnológica*).

The reform restructured federal funding mechanisms, expanded employer-education partnerships, and introduced new quality standards for vocational programmes. The work involved detailed modelling of fiscal impacts and projected labour market returns to guide the legislative debate.
